title: Canopy Growth Reports Second Quarter Fiscal 2022 Financial Results
text: Canopy Growth reported Q2 FY2022 financial results. Net revenue: $131.4 million (down 3% YoY). Net loss: $16.3 million (improved from $96.6 million loss in Q2 FY2021). Adjusted EBITDA loss: $162.6 million (wider loss vs. $85.7 million prior year). Gross margin: -54% (reported); -52% (adjusted). Free cash flow: -$101.3 million outflow. Cash position: $2.0 billion in cash and short-term investments. CEO David Klein stated: With a focused strategy, a foundation for growth, and our burgeoning U.S. ecosystem, Canopy is uniquely positioned to win as the industry matures. The company cited Canada supply challenges and a delayed revenue ramp in the U.S. as reasons for pushing out its positive Adjusted EBITDA target. Inventory write-downs totaled $87 million, primarily from excess Canadian cannabis inventory. Launched 40+ new SKUs globally. Maintained #1 market share in Canadian premium flower category.
